simulations.title: Open Browser
simulations.description: How a keyboard shortcut launches the Browser application.

nodes.label: Desktop
nodes.description: User is on the desktop

nodes.label: Keyboard Event
nodes.description: User presses keyboard shortcut or clicks icon

nodes.label: Shortcut Engine
nodes.description: useKeyboardShortcuts.js captures and parses the keypress

nodes.label: Window Store
nodes.description: useWindowStore.openWindow("browser") is called

nodes.label: React Reconciliation
nodes.description: React detects state change and mounts BrowserApp component

nodes.label: Framer Motion
nodes.description: Window animates in with scale + opacity transition

nodes.label: Browser Window
nodes.description: Browser is now live and interactive on the desktop

simulations.title: Ask AI
simulations.description: How a natural language query flows through the AI Brain pipeline.

nodes.label: User Input
nodes.description: User types "open weather" in the AI assistant

nodes.label: Speech Recognition
nodes.description: Raw text captured from input field or microphone

nodes.label: Intent Engine
nodes.description: Regex + fuzzy matching determines intent: OPEN_APP

nodes.label: Entity Extraction
nodes.description: Identifies entity: appName = "weather"

nodes.label: Context Manager
nodes.description: Checks conversation history and current OS state

nodes.label: Knowledge Graph
nodes.description: Queries local JSON knowledge base for app metadata

nodes.label: Action Dispatcher
nodes.description: Fires useWindowStore.openWindow("weather")

nodes.label: Response Generator
nodes.description: Crafts: "Opening Weather for you!"

nodes.label: Desktop
nodes.description: Weather app opens, AI confirms action

simulations.title: Weather Fetch
simulations.description: How weather data flows from the API to the desktop widget.

nodes.label: Widget Mount
nodes.description: Weather Widget component mounts on the desktop

nodes.label: Weather Store
nodes.description: useWeatherStore.fetchWeather() dispatched

nodes.label: Weather Service
nodes.description: weatherService.js prepares the API request

nodes.label: OpenWeather API
nodes.description: External HTTP request to api.openweathermap.org

nodes.label: JSON Response
nodes.description: API returns temperature, humidity, conditions

nodes.label: Zustand Update
nodes.description: Store state updated with parsed weather data

nodes.label: React Re-render
nodes.description: Widget re-renders with live weather data

simulations.title: Open File Explorer
simulations.description: How the virtual file system initializes when File Explorer opens.

nodes.label: Desktop Icon
nodes.description: User double-clicks the File Explorer icon

nodes.label: Click Handler
nodes.description: Desktop Store processes the icon click event

nodes.label: Window Store
nodes.description: openWindow("fileexplorer") creates window entry

nodes.label: FileSystem Store
nodes.description: useFileSystemStore initializes virtual directory tree

nodes.label: Explorer Render
nodes.description: FileExplorerApp renders with sidebar + file grid

nodes.label: Window Animation
nodes.description: Framer Motion pop-in animation completes

simulations.title: Voice Command
simulations.description: How a spoken voice command is processed end-to-end.

nodes.label: Microphone
nodes.description: Web Speech API starts recording

nodes.label: Speech Recognition
nodes.description: Browser SpeechRecognition converts audio to text

nodes.label: Voice Store
nodes.description: useVoiceStore receives transcript

nodes.label: Intent Engine
nodes.description: AI Brain parses the transcript for intent

nodes.label: Action Executor
nodes.description: Maps intent to a concrete OS action

nodes.label: Window Store
nodes.description: Executes the action (e.g., open app)

nodes.label: Desktop Update
nodes.description: UI updates to reflect the voice command result

simulations.title: F10 Presentation
simulations.description: How the F10 key triggers the immersive presentation mode.

nodes.label: Keyboard
nodes.description: User presses F10 key

nodes.label: Shortcut Engine
nodes.description: Captures F10 and maps to PRESENTATION action

nodes.label: Presentation Store
nodes.description: usePresentationStore.startPresentation() called

nodes.label: Fullscreen API
nodes.description: Browser enters fullscreen mode

nodes.label: Journey Mode
nodes.description: Cinematic presentation sequence begins

nodes.label: Auto-Advance
nodes.description: Slides transition with scale + blur effects
